name: tensor
description: Header-only C++20/23 named-axis differentiable tensor library aspiring to canonical-reference quality (ADR-0015, superseding ADR-0013).

webgpu.description: Enables the WebGPU KernelBackend adapter (ADR-0006 / ADR-0011 / ADR-0012 / ADR-0014 §1 / ADR-0016). As of 2026-05-12, 12 of 15 KernelBackend methods dispatch real Dawn compute on float (verified on RTX 3090); the rest delegate to reference. Requires Dawn — the simplest path is `vcpkg install 'dawn[core,vulkan]'` locally (the maintainer's verification path), or override builtin-baseline to one that includes dawn@20260410.140140+ and consume this manifest feature directly. Talks to Dawn through Dawn's own webgpu_cpp.h (ADR-0016 superseded the gpu.cpp wrapper choice from ADR-0014 §Decision Outcome point 2). Detailed designs: docs/detailed-design/webgpu-element-wise-kernels.md, docs/detailed-design/webgpu-gemm-kernel.md, docs/detailed-design/webgpu-broadcast-kernels.md, docs/detailed-design/kernel-backend-port.md.
